texto: What man seeks, to the point of anguish, in his gods, in his art, in his science, is meaning. He cannot bear the void. He pours meaning on events like salt on his food.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a François Jacob: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “What man seeks, to the point of anguish, in his gods, in his art, in his science, is meaning. He …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, belief, meaning pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de meaning.
